text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy is throwing a dance party at the
end of March called the Ligne Droite.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the gymnasium decorated and all the
students running about, I find myself swept up in
the festive mood once again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I discover Seiun Sky taking a nap in the back of
the seating area.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The lighting over there is now first-rate indeed!
All that's left is to decorate the center and
around the entrance.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Blooow... Blooow... Pah! ...Haha, blowing up all these balloons is pretty tiring!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With everyone as busy as they are, Seiun Sky
should be awake to help them, so I gently shake
her shoulder...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wah!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe... You scared me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You'll be punished for surprising me like that.
With that decided, it's back to dreamland...
choice_data_list: You're not worried about upsetting the others?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nooo need to worry. I've already been given a
task.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Am I that suspicious? I'm telling the truth.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
King caught me napping earlier and said she had
a job "perfectly fit" for me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
She wants me to dance on the dance floor and
check that all the lighting effects work and that
everything is safe, yada yada.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It would've been more work to refuse, so I figured
I'd just obediently wait here until it's my turn.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway... check me out. What do you think?
These are my best duds. Gramps was super
excited to buy 'em for me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: They just scream "Seiun Sky," don't they?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: They just scream "Seiun Sky," don't they?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph. What am I supposed to get out of an
answer like that?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Trainer, ya gotta say something like—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So coool!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Case in point.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You look so good! That's a bit sharper than your
usual, fluffy self. It's so stylish!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Right?! The shorts, I think, are really cute. That
outfit might be perfect for you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Even your shoelaces and ribbon go together! And
with the ribbon being on the longer side, it's
super cute.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And that ear bonnet! It's part of the outfit, right?
Wowie, you look great!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Time out.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? What?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. I need some fresh air. Yep, that's what I
need.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Also, Spe? You've been stressing about finding a
new dress, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! How'd you know?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Cause you were paying such close attention to my
ribbon and ear bonnet and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You hit the nail on the head. It's so hard
to choose anything...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was about to give up on buying a dress this year
and just rent something.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I kinda wanna find something that would suit
me as well as that outfit suits you...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I just have to keep looking! Thanks, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There's no one like Spe, is there? She had you lying through your teeth.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Yep, time for some good ol' fresh air.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? Refined?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Guess I do look refined! You know I can
change like a chameleon.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who's changed outfits, proceed to the
dance hall for the lighting check! In pairs, please!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? In pairs?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, I already told you this morning. You'll be
dancing with a partner for the safety check!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Geez, what should I do? It doesn't look like
there's anyone else without a partner...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And I'm just asking for trouble later if I decide to
dip out.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh... I got it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Just one song, pleeease?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It'll be fiiine—don't sweat it. All you gotta do is
move your feet in the direction I pull you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The important part is wrapping this up quick so I
can get back to napping!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She grabs my right hand and lays her other hand
over my left shoulder as an energetic song begins
to play on the dance floor.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Right, left, now spin around, take a step back...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Look at you getting the hang of it! You're really
good at this, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? Did you just step on my tail? Pull yourself
together, hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky leads me this way and that on the
dance floor... The song ends before I even know
it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All right, we're done.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Um, excuse me! That dance you just did, what's it
called?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I could see the basics in it, but you added a
creative flair too! And you two were totally in
sync. I want to try it myself!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You don't say. Well, let's see... It's called, um...
the Sei Special?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Knowing what I do about Sei, I would wager she
simply made that dance up as she went.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wha?! She made it up?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Just imagine the two of you are clouds, gently
floating above the wind.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You would be one to conjure up that imagery... And it's no surprise your trainer would simply go along with it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Well, Trainer is pretty smitten with me, you
know?
